summary: Completed Landing Page UI with Interactive Chat & Dark Mode
project_changes: New ChatMockup.tsx component for interactive demos
Comprehensive Dark Mode system with instant switching
decisions: Used 'Transition Suppression' hack for dark mode to solve browser rendering lag.
Kept scroll header logic separate in Header.astro for clean lifecycle management.
Used auto-rows-fr for grid layout to avoid inconsistent card heights.
next_steps: Validate the site across different browsers (Safari/Firefox)
Add remaining pages (Privacy, Terms) if required
